args.query:
SELECT trim(ltrim(o.OwnerId,'#')) AS AgentId, SUM(COALESCE(oi.Quantity,0) * COALESCE(oi.UnitPrice,0)) AS SalesAmount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON oi.OrderId = o.Id
WHERE DATE(o.EffectiveDate) >= DATE('2022-06-25') AND DATE(o.EffectiveDate) <= DATE('2022-11-25')
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;

LIMIT 1;
